## Preceding prose

> It is often desired to change the key (`K`), meter (`M`), or unit note length (`L`) mid-tune. These, and most other [information fields](#information_field_definition "abc:standard:v2.1 ↵") which can be legally used within the [tune body](#tune_body_definition "abc:standard:v2.1 ↵"), can be specifie
